input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported javaTest failure appears to be a behavioral/test-compatibility issue in the existing 3.2.21 test suite when run against 3.3.5, not missing setup.

Tests that deliberately exercise OGNL internals or JDK inaccessible-member handling may need to preserve the existing test JVM argument --add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED, but ordinary OGNL expression evaluation does not require it as scaffold setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is an in-process expression/property access library; its only runtime library dependency, Javassist, is declared transitively by ognl:ognl:3.3.5, and normal usage needs no Docker service or global environment/system property.
